  self-contained lines by re-slicing each line out of the newline-stripped

  with explicit newlines and for wrap output.

  always passes the result through splitAnsi so wrap mode and \`none\` share
  the same normalization path.

feat(tui): theme slots support Style values; add resolveStyleSlot

Theme slots can now hold either a Color (fg-only shortcut) or a full
Style (with attrs + bg). `resolveStyleSlot` handles both forms so
components can accept `string | Style` for per-part styling and fall
back to a conventional theme slot by name.

`colorParams` now throws if a slot reached via `fg`/`bg` holds a Style
object — that's the wrong channel for it. Use *Style fields instead.

Adds `border` and `borderTitle` slots to both themes:
  moon: border = "muted", borderTitle = { bold: true, fg: "primary" }
  ansi: same.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(tui): themed borders with align, title, and per-part styles

drawBorder takes an options bag — `{ title, titleAlign, borderStyle,
titleStyle, theme }` — and wraps border glyphs and the title segment
with their own SGR runs.

Box exposes three new BoxStyle fields:
  borderStyle?: string | Style        // defaults to theme slot "border"
  borderTitleStyle?: string | Style   // defaults to "borderTitle"
  borderTitleAlign?: "left" | "center" | "right"

Inline `{}` opts out of the default slot for unstyled glyphs. Center
alignment rounds leading h-cells down so odd slack biases the title
slightly left.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
